titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of Geology records14-15-728
titlestmt.author: Compiled by T.A. Gobert

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-06 00:00:03 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Geology records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Department of Geology (Title of work: News letter..)

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, abtracts, registers, and other records.
did.abstract: The papers of the Geology Department consist of examination reports, reptints, abstracts of geology lectures, estimates of departmental needs, registers of geology students (1947, 1957), issues of the department newsletter (spelled "news letter"), and other records and correspondence.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The papers of the Geology Department consist of examination reports, reprints, abstracts of geology lectures, estimates of departmental needs, registers of geology students (1947, 1957), issues of the department newsletter (spelled "news letter"), and other records and correspondence, including letters and copies of letters to and/or from George Francis Atkinson, Thomas Frederick Crane, Adam Capen Gill, Gilbert Dennison Harris, Heinrich Ries, Jacob Gould Schurman, Ralph Stockman Tarr, Walter Francis Willcox, Henry Shaler Williams, and others. Also reprints from Department faculty.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Geology records, #14-15-728. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Correspondence, examinations, and other records
Miscelaneous, notes, and reports. Includes report on the adjustment of McGraw Hall, annual reports, inventory of the department, term information..

Geology Department abstract of lectures
Geology Department News Letter
Geology Department registers
Register 1868-1947 and News Letters 1947-1951
McGraw Hall and the Department of Geology - Excerpts from the Cornell Era
McGraw Hall and the Department of Geology - Excerpts from the Cornell Era
Bound volumes of reprints by Department of Geology faculty or otherwise related to the Department
1. What is the Carboniferous System? by Williams
2. Muscles of the Chelonian and Human Shoulder-Girdles by Williams

5. On a Crinoid with Movable Spines by Williams
6. Devonian Lamellibranchiata and Species-Making by Williams
7. On the Different Types of the Devonian in North America by Williams
8. On the Different Types of the Devonian System in North America by Williams
9. The Cuboides Zone and its Fauna - A Discussion of Methods of Correlation by Williams
10. An address entitled, The scope of Paleontology and its Value to Geology by Williams
11. On the Brachial Apparatus of Hinged Brachiopoda and on Their Phylogeny by Williams
12. Ventral Plates of the Carapace of the Genus Holonema of Newberry by Williams
13. Elements of the Geological Time-Scale by Williams
14. G. H. and Gill, A. C. Contributions to the Mineralogy of Maryland by Williams
15. On the Age of the Manganese Beds of the Batesville Region of Arkansas by Williams
16. Dual Nomenclature in Geological Classification by Williams

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Done while at Yale
